cluster.representative_title: One killed, another injured in fresh Jos South ambush

stories.title: One killed, another injured in fresh Jos South ambush
stories.summary:
A fresh attack in Sabon Gidan Kanar community of Gyel District in Jos South Local Government Area of Plateau State has left one person dead, and another seriously injured, sources have said.

The post One killed, another injured in fresh Jos South ambush appeared first on Vanguard News.

stories.title: Plateau: One killed, another injured in Jos South ambush
stories.summary:
One person has been killed and another injured following an ambush by armed men at Sabon Gidan Kanar in the Jos South Local Government Area of Plateau State.

The post Plateau: One killed, another injured in Jos South ambush appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.
